prompt: A friend just messaged: 'my mum died last night.' Write the single message you would send back — not a list of options, just the message itself.
response:
Oh God, I'm so sorry. I just read your message.

I'm here. Whatever you need — to talk, to sit in silence on the phone, for me to come over, to bring you food, nothing at all — just tell me. No pressure to respond right now.

I love you. I'm so, so sorry.
